title: DataObjectSearchIndexConf - Metadata API
description: Represents the source Data 360 data model object (DMO) for Search Answers and holds the search index that Search Answers uses when searching DMO records.

application.description: The name of the app that the Search Answers index is associated with.

channel.description: The search channel that the Search Answers configuration applies to.

masterLabel.description: The name of the Search Answers configuration.

nameFieldReference.description: The name field of the DMO selected as a source for Search Answers.

objectReference.description: The DMO that the Search Answers configuration applies to.

retriever.description: The retriever that accesses the Search Answers indexed data.

searchIndex.description: The name of the search index mapped to the DMO.

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="DataObjectSearchIndexConf">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="application" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="channel" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="masterLabel" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="nameFieldReference" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="objectReference" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="retriever" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="searchIndex" type="xsd:string"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="Metadata">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="fullName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
```
